title: FedRAMP 20x CLI Command Register
description: Machine-readable schema for the CLI Command Register — the single source of truth mapping each Key Security Indicator (KSI) to its AWS CLI validation commands, evidence paths, and pass/fail criteria.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this KSI validates

justification.description: Rationale explaining why this validation approach satisfies the KSI requirement

command.description: The AWS CLI or shell command to execute for evidence collection

note.description: Context tag explaining the purpose of this specific command (e.g. BOUNDARY, COMPUTE, DETECTION)

expected_output.description: Human-readable description of what successful output looks like

cli_commands.description: Ordered list of CLI commands executed for this KSI validation

items.description: Relative path to an evidence artifact file

artifact_evidence_paths.description: Paths to the redacted evidence artifacts generated by each CLI command

implementation_summary.description: Narrative explaining how Meridian implements this security control in production

pass_criteria.description: Machine-evaluable conditions under which this KSI is marked PASS

fail_criteria.description: Machine-evaluable conditions under which this KSI is marked FAIL

service_hint.description: Optional hint for the validation engine indicating the primary AWS service (e.g. ec2, s3, iam)

outcome_class.description: Optional name of the outcome evaluator class used by the System 2.5 engine
